member.name: M:BlockApp.App.Services.BlocklistCacheService.Normalize(System.String)
member.summary: Normalize phone number to Thai local format (0xxxxxxxxx) for comparison. Strips spaces/dashes, converts +66 international to local format.

member.name: T:BlockApp.App.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
